studyName: Characterization of Taste Genetics and Oral Microbiome in Early Childhood Caries

tables.description: This subject phenotypes data table includes age, rural or urban residence status, Socioeconomic Factor Index score (SEFI), and disease status.

variables.name: Host_disease
variables.description: Disease status of host based on Early Childhood Caries (ECC) status

variables.name: RuralUrban
variables.description: Rural or Urban classification of residence

variables.name: SEFI_score
variables.description: Socioeconomic Factor Index score based on postal codes derived from Manitoba Centre for Health Policy (MCHP) data

variables.name: host_age_in_months
variables.description: Age of the subject in months

tables.description: This sample attributes table includes body site, analyte type, and tumor status.
The subject consent dataset contains subject IDs, consent group information, and biological sex.

variables.name: CONSENT
variables.description: Registered consent groups (Data Use Limitations (DUL)) as determined by submitters' Institutional Review Boards (IRB) or equivalent body.

tables.description: This subject sample mapping data table includes a mapping of study subject IDs to sample IDs. Samples are the final preps submitted for genotyping, sequencing, and/or expression data. For example, if one patient (subject ID) gave one sample, and that sample was processed differently to generate 2 sequencing runs, there would be two rows, both using the same subject ID, but having 2 unique sample IDs.
